note: A baseline is 'clean' when the only rules that fire are on the documented allowlist of intentional realism. Precision in detection_<profile>.json is computed by diffing injected-run issues against these organic baseline issues, so allowlisted organic hits are never counted as false positives.

allowlist.COMP-008: ≈25% of parts intentionally have no manufacturer part number (realistic sparsity).
allowlist.XFLD-001: Some MAKE parts at tier>=2 legitimately have no BOM yet (in-development items).
allowlist.TEMP-002: A share of active parts are intentionally older than the staleness threshold.
allowlist.ANOM-001: Cost history walks with random drift; a few steps naturally exceed the 4x band.
allowlist.ANOM-002: Lead-time history drifts; a few steps naturally exceed the 3x band.
allowlist.ANOM-004: Multi-supplier parts naturally show price spread; a few exceed the 2.5x band.
allowlist.DOCR-001: Quotes are generated with +/-10% price noise vs ERP; some exceed the 30% band.
allowlist.DOCR-002: Quotes carry lead-time noise vs ERP; some exceed the 14-day band.
allowlist.DOCR-003: Some quotes are generated already past their validity window.
allowlist.GRPH-003: Shared components can legitimately appear under one parent across revisions.
